supplyPartnerId.description: ID of the supply partner. This parameter can be either a string or integer for Prebid.js, however integer is preferred

inventory_id.description: ID of the supply partner. This parameter can be either a string or integer for Prebid.js, however integer is preferred

supply_partner_id.description: ID of the supply partner. This parameter can be either a string or integer for Prebid.js, however integer is preferred

bidfloor.description: Minimum acceptable bid price. Must be a positive number.

instl.description: Interstitial flag (1 for interstitial, 0 for non-interstitial).

video.description: Object containing video targeting parameters. See [Video Object](#video-object) for details.
